s2.ptxt: Install a new bearing bracket hole snap ring to the front drive shaft assembly RH.
Using SST and a steel plate, install a new front drive shaft bearing.
Using a snap ring expander, install a new drive shaft hole snap ring.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DUST COVER

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a press, install a new drive shaft dust cover.

item.ptxt: The dust cover should be completely installed.
Be careful not to damage the dust deflector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DUST COVER RH

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a press, install a new drive shaft dust cover RH until distance (A) from the tip of the center drive shaft to the drive shaft dust cover RH meets the specification.

item.ptxt: The dust cover should be completely installed.
Be careful not to damage the dust deflector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DUST COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a press, install a new drive shaft dust cover LH.

item.ptxt: The dust cover should be completely installed.
Be careful not to damage the dust deflector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT

s2.ptxt: Hold the drive shaft lightly in a vise between aluminium plates.

atten4.ptxt: Before installing the boots, wrap the spline of the drive shaft with vinyl tape to prevent the boots from being damaged.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install a new outboard joint boot to the drive shaft with the 2 clamps.
Pack the outboard joint shaft and boot with grease.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP

s2.ptxt: Hold the drive shaft lightly in a vise between aluminum plates.
Install the 2 outboard joint boot clamps onto the boot.
Place SST onto the outboard joint boot clamp.
Tighten the SST so that the outboard joint boot clamp is pinched.
Using SST, measure the clearance of the outboard joint boot clamp.

atten3.ptxt: If the measured value is greater than the specified value, retighten the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 2 outboard joint boot clamp onto the boot.
Place SST onto the No. 2 outboard joint boot clamp.
Tighten the SST so that the No. 2 outboard joint boot clamp is pinched.
Using SST, measure the clearance of the No. 2 outboard joint boot clamp.

atten3.ptxt: If the measured value is greater than the specified value, retighten the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER LH (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install the drive shaft damper to the drive shaft.
Make sure that the damper is on the shaft groove.
Set the distance as specified below.
Install the drive shaft damper clamp onto the drive shaft damper.

atten3.ptxt: Be sure to install the clamp in the correct position.

s2.ptxt: Place SST onto the drive shaft damper clamp.
Tighten the SST so that the clamp is pinched.
Using SST, measure the clearance of the drive shaft damper clamp.

atten3.ptxt: If the measured value is greater than the specified value, retighten the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER RH (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install the front drive shaft damper RH.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedures as for the front drive shaft damper LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER LH (for 2AZ-FE Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Install the drive shaft damper to the drive shaft.
Make sure that the damper is on the shaft groove.
Set the distance as specified below.
Using a screwdriver, install a new drive shaft damper clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER RH (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install the drive shaft damper to the drive shaft.
Make sure that the damper is on the shaft groove.
Set the distance as specified below.
Using a screwdriver, install a new drive shaft damper clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE INBOARD JOINT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install a new inboard joint boot to the drive shaft with the 2 clamps.
Place the beveled side of the tripod joint axial spline toward the outboard joint shaft.
Align the matchmarks.
Using a brass bar and hammer, tap in the tripod joint to the outboard joint shaft.

item.ptxt: Be sure to install the tripod joint assembly in the correct direction.

s2.ptxt: Using a snap ring expander, install a new shaft snap ring.
Coat the outboard joint shaft and boot with grease.
Align the matchmarks and install the inboard joint assembly to the outboard joint shaft assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT

s2.ptxt: Install the inboard joint boot to the inboard joint assembly.
Check whether the drive shaft dimensions are within the following specifications.

atten4.ptxt: The following table shows dimension (A) of the drive shaft.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Hold the drive shaft lightly in a vise between aluminum plates.
Install the 2 inboard joint boot clamps onto the boot.
Place SST onto the inboard joint boot clamp.
Tighten the SST so that the inboard joint boot clamp is pinched.
Using SST, measure the clearance of the inboard joint boot clamp.

atten3.ptxt: If the measured value is greater than the specified value, retighten the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Hold the inboard joint shaft assembly in a vise between aluminium plates.
Install the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp onto the boot.
Place SST onto the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp.
Tighten the SST so that the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp is pinched.
Using SST, measure the clearance of the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp.

atten3.ptxt: If the measured value is greater than the specified value, retighten the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: For one touch type:

s3.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, install the inboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: For claw engagement type:

s3.ptxt: Using needle nose pliers, install the inboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: For one touch type:

s3.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, install the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: For claw engagement type:

s3.ptxt: Using needle nose pliers, install the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DRIVE SHAFT LH HOLE SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Install a new hole snap ring.
Check that there is no excessive play in the outboard joint.
Check that the inboard joint slides smoothly in the thrust direction.
Check that there is no excessive play in the radial directions of the inboard joint.
Check the boots for damage.
